meaning: n.哈布斯堡王朝(欧洲最古老的王室家族)adj.哈布斯堡王朝(或王室家族)的
examples: Thanks to its location along the border of the Hapsburg Empire, Kosice has Slavic as well as Magyar roots.
A region and former duchy of central Europe in southern Austria. It was part of the Hapsburg domains after 335.
Through the course of her reign, negotiations were conducted with Erik of Sweden and the Hapsburg Archduke Charles.
Paris sent in fresh reinforcements, later squashing the Mexicans, and in two years installed an Austrian archduke, Maximilian Hapsburg, as puppet Emperor of Mexico.
December 23 and 24 were spent walking in a post-Hapsburg wonderland.
